s3hebacrl58rj75r5bbf7kug6k.summary: Review your pivot from ServiceNow to Celonis—the new visualization and process observability platform—to meet the urgent three-month claims mining mandate. Draft the required position paper for Suresh detailing the BPO Workbench architecture, which leverages Kafka events and Snowflake data. Coordinate with Calvin's team to execute the data mining and manage Amit's portfolio during his upcoming multi-week absence—starting with a final 1:1 download of his active work.
tasks: Draft the urgent position paper for Suresh outlining the BPO Workbench architecture and components.
Coordinate with Calvin's team to shepherd the claims business through mining their data in Celonis within the three-month mandate.
Conduct a final download of active work with Amit during your upcoming 1:1 to establish coverage during his multi-week absence.
Engage Amit on the transition of the task management RFP to the Property & Casualty team.
s3hebacrl58rj75r5bbf7kug6k.title: Sync up on BPM and observability architecture
